claims.claim: Rust 1.96 required (badge + toolchain).
MIT license.
665+ tests under default cargo t; 5 ignored.
claims.note: Conservative baseline as of 2026-06-20. Memory context mentions 683 from the 06-21 second-audit session; not promoted to README without a fresh PERFORMANCE.md update.

claims.claim: Rust edition 2024.
Repository URL: github.com/yurvon-screamo/smos.
claims.note: Replaces the old uwuwu-agent parent path; standalone repo URL.

claims.claim: ort =2.0.0-rc.12 (exact pin) for native NLI.
SurrealDB embedded with RocksDB + HNSW vector index.
claims.note: HNSW is the SurrealDB 2.x vector index type used by the schema.

claims.claim: axum 0.8, reqwest 0.12, rig-core 0.14, tokio-cron-scheduler 0.14.
Release profile: LTO = true, codegen-units = 1.
claims.note: Binary size claim (~72MB from project brief) intentionally omitted — unverifiable without a release build present in target/.

claims.claim: DeBERTa-v3-large-mnli-fever-anli-ling-wanli model id; ~643 MB ONNX.
Deterministic extraction: temperature = 0.0, seed = 42.
Confidence: base 0.5, multi_source_bonus 0.2, no_contradiction_bonus 0.1, accept_threshold 0.7, pending_threshold 0.4.
Session timeout 1800s (30 min), scan_interval 60s, pending_overflow 20.
extraction.dedup_cosine_threshold = 0.95; merge.cosine_threshold = 0.85.
NLI thresholds: contradiction 0.5, entailment 0.6.
GPU features: nli-cuda, nli-directml, nli-metal, nli-webgpu (mutually exclusive).
claims.note: AGENTS.md notes CoreML is the actual EP behind nli-metal.

claims.claim: Drift-priority walk: scan every candidate, first contradiction wins, merge pick held but not committed until scan is contradiction-free.
C3 guard: already-flagged conflict pairs skip the NLI call but still count as observed.
Exact-match short-circuit: identical text returns NliResult::exact_match_result() (Entailment, 1.0/0.0/0.0, available=true) without invoking DeBERTa.
FactId = SHA1(content) is the exact-match dedup identity.
smos audit subcommand exists with --provider and --dry-run flags; runs independently of [audit].enabled.
claims.note: README initially claimed 'smos audit --run-once' — incorrect. Corrected to 'smos audit [--provider cloud|local] [--dry-run]'.

claims.claim: [server].allowed_origins field exists; default CORS is CorsLayer::permissive() with a startup warning on non-localhost binds.
3-crate workspace with enforced one-way dependency: domain <- application <- adapters.
claims.note: A layering violation fails to compile because smos-domain's Cargo.toml does not declare the IO crates.

claims.claim: Async port traits are Send-bounded at the adapter call site, not at the port definition.
sources: smos-rust/AGENTS.md (Architecture reminders: 'Async port traits are Send-bounded at the adapter call site, not at the port definition.')

claims.claim: Multi-provider strategies: single / round_robin / failover.
sources: smos.toml:38-39 ([upstream.strategy] mode = "single"), smos.toml:20-22 (comment lists all three modes)

claims.claim: Default bind: 127.0.0.1:8888.
SSE streaming passthrough through axum + reqwest bytes_stream.
claims.note: Module presence + dependency features confirm; exact byte-for-byte passthrough verified by existing e2e_passthrough tests.

claims.claim: Dreaming agent is opt-in, disabled by default, writes a markdown report under [audit].report_dir.
